title: begonia × erythrophylla
intro: Begonia × erythrophylla, also known as the Polynesian begonia, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Begoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Begonia × erythrophylla is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy in these forms.
